title: windows CI flake: Invalid Password
body:
Looks like something is broken with how the password is generated
```
Location: C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\cirrus-ci-build\repo
Set-LocalUser : Unable to update the password. The value provided for the new password does not meet the length, 
complexity, or history requirements of the domain.
At C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\cirrus-ci-build\repo\contrib\cirrus\win-sess-launch.ps1:19 char:5
+     Set-LocalUser -Name $username -Password $encPass
+     ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : InvalidArgument: (:) [Set-LocalUser], InvalidPasswordException
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : InvalidPassword,Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.SetLocalUserCommand
 
Exit code = '1' running command at 
```

https://cirrus-ci.com/task/6173303390339072
https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6173303390339072/logs/main.log
